survey_questions.question_text: How motivated are you feeling today?
How satisfied are you with your work right now?
How connected do you feel with your team?
Do you feel recognised for your contributions?
How well are you handling pressure today?
How emotionally balanced do you feel right now?
How empathetic do you feel towards your colleagues today?
Do you feel you have growth opportunities here?
Do you feel your work has a clear purpose?
How clear do you feel about your goals this week?
In ONE word, how would you describe your energy today?
Pick the emoji that best matches your Monday mood!
survey_questions.options: 😄 Pumped|😊 Good|😐 Meh|😴 Tired|😤 Frustrated|🔥 On Fire|🌧️ Gloomy|🚀 Unstoppable

survey_questions.question_text: How likely are you to recommend this organisation as a workplace? (0=Never, 10=Definitely)
Any message for your manager or team? (Optional)

survey_response.feedback: Feeling motivated and supported by team
I don't like to work here.

engagement_interventions.title: Burnout Intervention — Production
engagement_interventions.description: Production team showing 45% burnout risk over last 3 weeks. Stress scores averaging 4.2/5.
engagement_interventions.recommended_action: Schedule 1-on-1 manager check-ins for affected employees

engagement_interventions.title: Recognition Campaign — Finance
engagement_interventions.description: Finance department recognition scores dropped to 2.1/5 for two consecutive cycles.
engagement_interventions.recommended_action: Launch peer recognition programme for the department

engagement_interventions.title: Team Connection Drive — Operations
engagement_interventions.description: Team connection scores at 2.3/5. Remote team members feeling isolated.
engagement_interventions.recommended_action: Organise team-building activity to improve cohesion

engagement_interventions.title: Communication Coaching — HR
engagement_interventions.description: Multiple feedback entries cite poor top-down communication from department leads.
engagement_interventions.recommended_action: Run anonymous feedback session to identify root causes

engagement_interventions.title: Workload Review — Maintenance
engagement_interventions.description: Maintenance staff overtime exceeding 15% of workforce. Stress at 4.4/5.
engagement_interventions.recommended_action: Review and redistribute workload across the team

engagement_interventions.title: Participation Drive — Quality
engagement_interventions.description: Quality dept survey participation dropped to 35% this month.
engagement_interventions.recommended_action: Introduce flexible work arrangements for high-stress roles
